title: Mrdorkyman's Random Stuff
description: This mod includes random things I made in MCreator, along with many crafting recipes and advancements.
body:
This is my first ever mod ever! It's basically just a collection of random things I wanted to add, including Pizza, Corrupt blocks, Dynamite, and much more! This mod adds a few new things to play around with, and so the features added should not affect gameplay.  I will also be updating this mod with new features every once in a while.

**WARNING! Corruption blocks can cause heavy lag if left out for too long; it can also wreck your world! Be careful!**



You may comment your ideas or suggestions. I need your ideas so I can create more content!
